Kyoho
Website Design • 2025
Kyoho is a global digital consulting marketplace that connects veried experts with clients across 25+ service categories
The landing page was the rst and most critical touch point for a brand-new platform entering a competitive space. With two distinct user types arriving at
the same URL, the page needed to do something genuinely dicult: speak to a client looking for guidance and a consultant building their practice,
simultaneously, without losing either. Every section had to earn attention, build condence, and move two very dierent people toward one clear next step.
Saas . B2B & B2C . Marketplace
The Challenge
One page. Two audiences. Zero confusion
Kyoho is a two-sided platform it speaks to clients looking for expert guidance and to consultants building their practice. Both land
on the same page. Both need to immediately understand what's in it for them
The challenge wasn't just visual. It was structural. How do you welcome two completely dierent users - one with a problem to solve,
one with a skill to sell, without making either feel like they've landed on the wrong page
The landing page had to do the heavy lifting - communicate credibility, reduce friction, and drive two very dierent CTAs, all at once.

ual-path architecture was the foundation. Rather than forcing a single narrative, the page was structured to gently split

The Kyoho landing page successfully communicates a complex, two-sided value proposition in a single, cohesive scroll
experience. Both clients and consultants can identify their path within seconds of landing without any explicit
"
pick your user
type
"
gate or friction

The design system established through this landing page the typography, color language, component style, and content
hierarchy, became the visual foundation for the broader platform.

TheReview Systemin the Kyoho App enables users
to quickly share feedback through a simple star
rating and optional comment, helping others make
informed choices. Reviews appear on provider
profiles, and providers can respond publicly,
fostering transparency and trust. The flow is clean,
intuitive, and optimized for both mobile and web
platforms.
